review_title: Powerful AI for Talent Management and Early-stage + Bootstrapped Companies
description: HrFlow.ai is an excellent choice for companies looking to leverage AI in their hiring and talent management processes. It excels in automation and data-driven decision-making, making recruitment more efficient. I think it may become an industry leader in AI-powered HR solutions.
author: Chris H.
pros: HrFlow.ai offers exceptional AI-driven resume parsing, candidate matching, and talent analytics. The API integrations are seamless, making it easy to connect with existing HR systems. The AI's ability to extract and analyze unstructured data from resumes and job descriptions is top-notch, saving significant time in recruitment processes. We sifted through a handful of other SaaS solutions and spent countless time trying to reinvent the API wheel, when all along they already made the wheel rounder at HrFlow!
cons: Well, it solved the main problem we had, and they even had an Early-stage/Bootstrap plan for a new startup like us. What more could we ask for, how can we say anything negative?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nikita B.
pros: Nothing
cons: Pure service. I asked them to delete my account with bank details a few times a half a year ago. My account is still working and they send me their marketing emails. Don't recommend at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient and Insightful CV Review with HrFlow.ai
description: Overall, my experience with HrFlow.ai was positive. I used it primarily for CV review, and it delivered strong, AI-driven results that saved time and improved the quality of candidate evaluations. The platform is robust and highly capable when it comes to parsing and analysing resume data.
author: Joseph I.
pros: I used HrFlow.ai primarily for CV review, and I was impressed by the platform’s accuracy and intelligence in parsing and analysing resumes. It does a great job extracting relevant data points and structuring the information clearly, which made it easier to assess candidate profiles at a glance. The AI-powered insights were also valuable, helping to highlight strengths and gaps in CVs efficiently. Overall, HrFlow.ai significantly streamlined the CV screening process.
cons: The platform can feel a bit overwhelming at first due to its many features and technical terminology
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Just Getting Started, but Great So Far
author: Dan S.
pros: The resume parser returns a LOT more data in it's JSON response than I've seen in other similar apps. They also make it incredibly easy to demo the app, by simply uploading a resume, and returning a link to a response via email in just seconds. I'm still on the free version and developing my software, but the pricing structure is very competitive & is going to allow me to scale my business as it grows, without a heavy upfront annual commitment. Really looking forward to continuing to work through this!
cons: 2 things:1. The first is minor, but while they do a lot of field level parsing for you, including skill sets, and summary of tasks (accomplishments), I'd love it if there was an option to request a json response that parsed the 'Experiences' > 'N' > 'Description' text into individual objects with the full text of each resume "bullet", instead of sending back all bullets under each experience as a single object. It's definitely not the end of the world; you can use js libraries, or even regex, to manage this after receiving the json, but it would be cool if this was done natively.2. Second isn't a complaint at all, more of an item on my wish-list. I'd love to to see HRFlow develop an API to support Resume-Job Description matching as well (similar to Affinda or JobScan)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
